reviews.review_text: I used to pirate this game, but I quickly realized it’s so good that the developers genuinely deserve my financial support. A huge shoutout to Li Wei and the community for tearing down the language barrier and allowing the English-speaking community to fully experience this masterpiece. The wait is finally over! The horrible couple of years of silence, i even gave up hoping. but now? watching it evolve from early access (spaghetti code problem)  into a brilliant full release. Huge applause to the dev team. Congrats
I love this game, but i need english :))
